---

title: "D04_02: Poisson Analysis Core"
subtitle: "Run univariate Poisson regression and classify predictors"
parent: "D04_poisson_marketing"
chapter: "CH12"
category: "derivation-task"
number: "D04_02"
date-created: "2025-12-14"
date-modified: "2025-12-30"
author: "Claude"
type: "derivation-task"
depends_on: []
outputs_to:
  - "app_data.df_{platform}_poisson_analysis_all"
  - "processed_data.df_{platform}_poisson_analysis_{product_line}"
implements:
  - script: "cbz_D04_02.R"
    path: "update_scripts/DRV/cbz/"
  - script: "eby_D04_02.R"
    path: "update_scripts/DRV/eby/"
related_principles:
  - "DM_R043: Predictor Data Classification"
  - "MP135: Type B Analytics"
  - "R118: Statistical Significance Documentation"
  - "R120: Variable Range Metadata"
  - "DM_R055: App Data Aggregation Preference"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-fold: false
---

# D04_02: Poisson Analysis Core {#overview}

This task runs **univariate Poisson regression** on complete time series data
and classifies predictors for UI routing. It is the core implementation for
CBZ and EBY Poisson analysis.

## Implementation Scripts

| Platform | Script | Location | Output |
|----------|--------|----------|--------|
| Cyberbiz | `cbz_D04_02.R` | `update_scripts/DRV/cbz/` | `app_data.df_cbz_poisson_analysis_all` |
| eBay | `eby_D04_02.R` | `update_scripts/DRV/eby/` | `app_data.df_eby_poisson_analysis_all` |

## Inputs

- `app_data.df_{platform}_sales_complete_time_series_{product_line}`

## Platform Preconditions

- **CBZ**: Run `scripts/update_scripts/ETL/cbz/cbz_ETL_sales_time_series_2TR.R`
  (or the [D04_04 wrapper](D04_04_time_series.qmd)) to generate
  `app_data.df_cbz_sales_complete_time_series_{product_line}` from
  `transformed_data.df_cbz_sales___transformed`, item profile tables, and the
  app product line list (`app_data.df_product_line` or CSV fallback).
- **EBY**: Run `scripts/update_scripts/ETL/eby/eby_ETL_sales_2TR___MAMBA.R` and
  `scripts/update_scripts/ETL/all/all_ETL_item_profile_0IM.R` first, then run
  `scripts/update_scripts/ETL/eby/eby_ETL_sales_time_series_2TR___MAMBA.R`
  (or [D04_04: Time Series Expansion](D04_04_time_series.qmd) wrapper) to generate
  `df_eby_sales_complete_time_series_{product_line}`.

## Outputs

- `processed_data.df_{platform}_poisson_analysis_{product_line}` (intermediate tables)
- `app_data.df_{platform}_poisson_analysis_all` (merged UI table; app filters by `product_line_id`)

## Task Definition (NSQL)

```nsql
CALCULATE D04_02_poisson_analysis:
  FOR EACH platform IN ['cbz', 'eby']:
    FROM app_data.df_{platform}_sales_complete_time_series_{product_line}
    RUN univariate_poisson_regression FOR EACH predictor
    CLASSIFY predictors (DM_R043)
    OUTPUT TO processed_data.df_{platform}_poisson_analysis_{product_line}
    MERGE OUTPUT TO app_data.df_{platform}_poisson_analysis_all
```

## Univariate Poisson Regression Method

D04_02 uses a **univariate** approach (one predictor at a time) to avoid
collinearity issues with sparse dummy variables.

```r
for (predictor in predictor_columns) {
  model <- glm(sales ~ predictor, data, family = poisson())
}
```

## Predictor Classification (DM_R043)

Each predictor is classified using three fields:

| Field | Purpose | Example |
|-------|---------|---------|
| `predictor_type` | UI routing | `time_feature`, `product_attribute`, `comment_attribute` |
| `data_type` | Statistical type | `binary`, `numerical`, `dummy` |
| `source_variable` | Dummy origin | `brand`, `material`, `color` |

## Platform Notes

- **CBZ**: `D04_05` and `D04_06` wrappers delegate here; `D04_04` is the ETL
  time-series wrapper and does not run Poisson logic.
- **EBY**: No `D04_06` wrapper exists; run `eby_D04_02.R` directly after D04_04
  (ETL time series wrapper).

## Next Task

Proceed to [D04_06: App Data Publishing](D04_06_app_data_publishing.qmd), and
optionally to:

- [D04_01: Time Label Enrichment](D04_01_time_label_enrichment.qmd)
- [D04_03: R120 Metadata Enrichment](D04_03_r120_metadata.qmd)
